---
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    tbl-cap-location: top
editor: source
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source(here::here("common.R"))
```

Scores from the outer evaluation folds per dataset and model, see `scores.[csv|rds]`.

## Score Plots

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Harrell's C

```{r scores-boxplot-harrell-c-group}
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 11

for (measure_id in msr_tbl[type == "Discrimination", id]) {
  print(plot_scores(
    scores,
    type = "box",
    eval_measure_id = measure_id,
    tuning_measure_id = "harrell_c",
    dodge = FALSE,
    flip = TRUE,
    color_var = "learner_group"
  ))
}
```

```{r scores-boxplot-harrell-c-hspace}
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 11

for (measure_id in msr_tbl[type == "Discrimination" & !erv, id]) {
  print(plot_scores(
    scores,
    type = "box",
    eval_measure_id = measure_id,
    tuning_measure_id = "harrell_c",
    dodge = FALSE,
    flip = TRUE,
    ncol = 5,
    color_var = "learner_hspace"
  ))
}
```

### ISBS

```{r scores-boxplot-isbs-group}
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 11

for (measure_id in msr_tbl[type == "Scoring Rule" & !erv, id]) {
  print(plot_scores(
    scores,
    type = "box",
    eval_measure_id = measure_id,
    tuning_measure_id = "isbs",
    dodge = FALSE,
    flip = TRUE,
    ncol = 5,
    color_var = "learner_group"
  ))
}
```

```{r scores-boxplot-isbs-hspace}
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 11

for (measure_id in msr_tbl[type == "Scoring Rule" & !erv, id]) {
  print(plot_scores(
    scores,
    type = "box",
    eval_measure_id = measure_id,
    tuning_measure_id = "isbs",
    dodge = FALSE,
    flip = TRUE,
    ncol = 5,
    color_var = "learner_hspace"
  ))
}
```

:::
